reachability.notes: placeit.net HTML + /api/v1,/api/v2 are Cloudflare-fronted (managed challenge in headless; cleared in headed). Algolia host KSLVR81FGG-dsn.algolia.net is NOT Cloudflare-fronted and answers raw POST with the public search key. Account/bookmarks endpoints require placeit.net session cookies (HttpOnly) + likely Surf TLS fingerprint.

auth.verified: GET /api/v1/get_user_type_banner returned 200 with valid subscription payload using browser session cookies

not_captured.download_render: Editor render/download flow deliberately not triggered (async blender render job, upload-dependent, Cloudflare-protected). Not cleanly replayable -> CLI ships 'open <stage>' deep-link resolver instead of a raw render command.
